food_service.label: Food Service (Restaurant, Food Truck, Catering, Bakery)
tips: Include your food safety certifications and permits
Mention your health inspection scores if they're good
Food cost should ideally be 28-35% of your menu price
Include seasonal menu variations if applicable
common_grants: Local Small Business Development Center (SBDC) micro-grants

beauty_wellness.label: Beauty & Wellness (Salon, Barbershop, Spa, Fitness)
tips: Highlight your cosmetology or barbering license
Include client retention rates if you track them
Mention any continuing education or specialty certifications
Product costs typically run 8-15% of service revenue

home_services.label: Home Services (Cleaning, Landscaping, Handyman, Pest Control)
tips: Include your insurance coverage details
Mention any bonding or licensing
Track and share your average job completion time
Customer acquisition cost in this industry is typically $50-150

retail.label: Retail (Boutique, Online Store, Market Vendor)
tips: Include your inventory turnover rate if you know it
Mention your supplier relationships
E-commerce? Include your shipping strategy and costs
Typical retail markup is 50-100% (keystone pricing)

professional_services.label: Professional Services (Consulting, Coaching, Marketing, Tax Prep)
tips: Your expertise IS the product — highlight credentials heavily
Include case studies or client results if possible
Typical margins for services are 50-80%
Mention your professional liability insurance
common_grants: Chamber of Commerce small business awards

childcare_education.label: Childcare & Education (Daycare, Tutoring, Training)
tips: Include all relevant licenses and certifications
Mention staff-to-child ratios if applicable
Include safety protocols and background check policies
This sector has strong grant opportunities — highlight community impact
common_grants: Child Care and Development Fund (CCDF) grants
